name: German Payslip
description: German Lohn-/Gehaltsabrechnung. Detects Steuerident-Nr., Rentenversicherungs-Nr., Krankenversicherungs-Nr., IBAN, German dates, German phone numbers, German street addresses (Greta-Junges-Weg 14) and German PLZ + city (30916 Isernhagen). Disables the noisy 'Amounts' detector so salary figures aren't over-redacted.

patterns.name: Rentenversicherungsnummer
patterns.description: German pension insurance number (8 digits + 1 uppercase letter + 3 digits)

patterns.name: Krankenversicherungsnummer
patterns.description: German health insurance number (1 uppercase letter + 9 digits)

patterns.name: IBAN
patterns.description: International Bank Account Number â€” supports spaces between groups

patterns.name: German phone number
patterns.description: German phone numbers â€” bounded to avoid matching inside longer numbers

patterns.name: German street address
patterns.description: German street address â€” name (often hyphenated) ending in Weg/StraĂŸe/Strasse/Platz/Gasse/Allee/Ring/Hof/Damm/Ufer/Steig/Chaussee/Tor/Markt + house number. Example: 'Greta-Junges-Weg 14', 'HauptstraĂŸe 27', 'KĂ¶nigsallee 2a'.

patterns.name: German postal code + city
patterns.description: German PLZ + city. 5-digit postal code + capitalized city, supports multi-word names (e.g. 'Frankfurt am Main', 'Rothenburg ob der Tauber'). Example: '30916 Isernhagen', '10117 Berlin', '60311 Frankfurt am Main'.
